# Bootstrap Instructions

This file exists only for the initial adoption of the Spec Kit in a new or existing repository.

## What to do first

Run `/init` before starting normal SDD feature work.

The init flow should:

- inspect the repository
- ask for the real project context
- replace placeholder kit context in foundational docs
- align ADRs, README, and instructions with the actual project

## After bootstrap

Once `/init` has fully materialized the project-specific baseline, this file should be deleted.

It is not part of the day-to-day SDD workflow.
